org.apache.dubbo.registry.client.event

类 ServiceDiscoveryInitializedEvent

  • java.lang.Object
    • java.util.EventObject
      • org.apache.dubbo.event.Event
        • org.apache.dubbo.registry.client.event.ServiceDiscoveryEvent
          • org.apache.dubbo.registry.client.event.ServiceDiscoveryInitializedEvent
  • 所有已实现的接口:
    Serializable

    public class ServiceDiscoveryInitializedEvent
extends ServiceDiscoveryEvent
    An event raised after the Service Discovery initialized
    从以下版本开始:
    2.7.5
    另请参阅:
    ServiceDiscovery.initialize(URL), 序列化表格
